prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程及其自动化等专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中持续处于高热推荐/推荐状态；宁夏2026年高考总人数约66000人，与2025年（历史类+物理类约65897人）基本持平，竞争格 局稳定；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，属中部地区，对西北地区考生有一定吸引力；该校在宁夏招生占比约2%（2025年数 据），属正常跨省招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至1939名的强劲反弹趋势、2026年计划缩招约21.5%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名稳居前31名的顶尖层 次、抖音高热度的报考关注度以及工科专业持续高热的社会热度，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年1939名基础上进一步前移（竞争加剧），预测最低位次约1668名，区间1418 -1918名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 1486; in 2023, due to a gap, it dropped to about 4865; in 2024, it rebounded to around 3834; in 2025, the physics category significantly recovered to about 1939, showing a clear upward trend over the past three years, with a baseline of approximately 1939 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's physics/science category: 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 53 in 2024, 65 in 2025, and 51 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 enrollment is reduced by about 21.5%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (32nd in 2021 → 29th in 2023 → 29th in 2025 → 31st in 2026), firmly among the top universities nationwide. Hunan University has no significant negative public opinion in reputation documents, maintaining a stable overall reputation. It ranks 16th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No records of admission line gaps or anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), with a balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, highly matching the majors offered in Ningxia, such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Intelligent Manufacturing.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently in high heat/recommended status in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis. The total number of Ningxia Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (history category + physics category about 65,897), indicating a stable competitive landscape. Hunan University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, in the central region, which has a certain appeal to candidates from the northwest. The university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (2025 data), which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound trend of the 2025 ranking to 1939, the intensified competition due to the approximately 21.5% enrollment reduction in 2026, the university's top-tier ranking (31st in Soft Science), the high Douyin popularity and application attention, and the sustained social heat of engineering majors, it is expected that the lowest ranking for the physics category in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 1939 (due to intensified competition). The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 1668, with a range of 1418-1918.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology (including Software Engineering)
- Computer Science and Technology (Intelligent Experimental Class)
- Automation (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Cyberspace Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Intelligent Construction (including Civil Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering (Low-Carbon Building Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1418-1918, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1418), you can prioritize top-tier majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>1918), it is advisable to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also looking at Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The university has strong engineering capabilities, and A- discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science are worth prioritizing.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 863; in 2023, it rose to about 408; in 2024, it fell back to about 564; in 2025, the history category rank was about 489, with an overall fluctuation range of 408-863, and a 2025 baseline of about 489. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Ningxia: 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 11 in 2025, and 22 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a 100% expansion, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country. Hunan University has a stable reputation with no significant negative public opinion; it ranks 16th in Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating high application attention. Its strong disciplines in Business Administration (A) and Applied Economics (A-) align well with history category majors such as Finance, Economics, and Accounting. Although Law is not separately rated, it benefits from the university's comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Finance/Economics majors show mixed popularity trends; Law is recommended as relatively hot; Chinese Language and Literature is recommended as relatively hot. The total number of Ningxia Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 66,000, roughly the same as in 2025. Hunan University is located in Changsha, a strong educational city in central China, which has some appeal to liberal arts candidates from the northwest. The university's history category enrollment in Ningxia accounts for about 2%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 rank baseline of 489, the significant easing of competition due to the expansion of the 2026 plan from 11 to 22 (doubling), the sustained appeal of the 985 level to liberal arts candidates, and the stable popularity of economics/management/law majors, it is expected that the minimum rank for the history category in 2026 will shift backward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum rank is about 812, with a range of 690-934.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (Mentorship Training)
- Finance
- Accounting (Smart Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Mentorship Training, can be selected into the Humanities Experimental Class)
- Economics (including Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently; all history category majors in Ningxia are popular economics/management/law/literature majors, with overall high thresholds.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 690-934, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<690), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Finance; if your rank is close to the upper limit of the range (>934), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Economics and Chinese Language and Literature. All history category majors at this university are popular liberal arts directions, with Law having clear advantages for civil service exams, and Finance/Accounting offering good employment prospects.
